criteria_scores.rationale: With GERD recovering to 2.45% GDP and 1650M EUR in quantum funding, standardisation channels recovery investment into interoperable infrastructure at lower cost.
Certification scales demand for quantum-skilled workers; high-tech employment at 5.3% provides a strong labour pool to draw from.
Energy-efficiency standards for quantum hardware reduce footprint during scale-up.
